diagrams.title: Virtual Cluster Architecture
diagrams.description: Layered architecture showing physical infrastructure, virtualization layer, and virtual cluster components
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate how virtual clusters abstract physical resources and provide isolated tenant environments

diagrams.title: VM Placement Bin Packing
diagrams.description: Demonstrates First-Fit Decreasing algorithm for consolidating VMs onto physical hosts
diagrams.purpose: Visualize resource optimization through bin packing algorithms in virtual cluster management

diagrams.title: Live Migration Process
diagrams.description: Shows pre-copy live migration stages from source to destination host
diagrams.purpose: Explain zero-downtime VM migration critical for maintenance and load balancing
